thinks.think: Two LEGO minifigures stand on a white circular platform; one wears a light blue uniform, the other a translucent green ghost. Behind them, a grassy hill leads to a red-and-white striped circus tent entrance with a clown face, glowing red eyes, and orange fire effects. A mini-map is in the bottom left, health hearts in the top left, and "GAMMEPLAY" appears top right.

A new minifigure with black hair, a white shirt, and blue legs enters the foreground left, facing the platform. On the white circle, a bright yellow explosion erupts around the blue-uniformed figure. A gold stud counter displaying "1.362.890" appears at the top center. The green ghost remains standing nearby on the right.

The gold stud counter at the top center increments from 1.362.890 to 1.363.300 while silver studs float in the upper air. The bright yellow explosion effect persists around the blue-uniformed figure on the white platform. The camera pans slightly right, revealing more of the wooden bench.

The gold stud counter increases to 1.363.730 while silver studs float near the top. The bright yellow explosion effect around the blue-uniformed figure disappears, revealing them standing normally. A minifigure with brown hair and a dark jacket enters the bottom left corner, joining the black-haired figure visible nearby.

The camera pans left as the blue-uniformed minifigure runs off the white platform and jumps up the grassy hill toward the stairs. A brown-haired figure in a dark jacket runs across the foreground left, passing a white ground marker. Silver and gold studs float near a black lamppost while the stud counter increments to 1.363.760.

The camera shifts right as the blue-uniformed minifigure runs toward a wooden bench near a black lamppost. The bench tilts upward, spawning a vertical line of floating silver studs. A black-haired minifigure in a white shirt stands in the foreground left, while the green ghost figure is partially visible on the far left. The gold stud counter reads 1.364.010.

The blue-uniformed minifigure jumps mid-air near the stairs then lands on the white platform. The black-haired minifigure moves to the right foreground, while the green ghost shifts to the platform's right side. A brown-haired figure walks left in the background. The stud counter rises to 1.364.250, and the wooden bench is upright again.

The blue-uniformed minifigure and green ghost remain stationary on the white platform. The brown-haired minifigure in the dark jacket ascends the stairs toward the circus tent entrance. The black-haired minifigure in the white shirt walks further right along the paved path. The stud counter disappears from the top center of the screen.

The blue-uniformed minifigure on the central white platform extends both arms outward in a new pose. In the background, the brown-haired and black-haired minifigures walk further up the stone stairs toward the tent entrance. The green ghost figure remains standing on the right side of the platform.

The blue-uniformed minifigure on the central platform transforms, revealing a red face and red hands while striking a dynamic pose with arms raised. The green ghost figure remains standing to the right. In the background, the brown-haired and black-haired minifigures continue ascending the stone stairs toward the circus tent entrance.

The blue-uniformed minifigure completes its transformation into a large, muscular red figure with black pants, standing centrally on the white platform. The translucent green ghost figure remains stationary to the right. In the background, two smaller minifigures continue walking up the stone stairs toward the circus tent entrance.

The camera rotates to a side profile view, bringing a wooden bench and black lamppost into focus on the right. The large red muscular figure stands on the left side of the white platform, facing the green ghost figure. The character portrait in the top-left corner updates to display the red figure's face.

The green hooded figure stands centrally facing the large red muscular figure on the white platform. The top-left UI shows a green skull-faced portrait labeled "Doctor Muerte." A character selection bar containing numerous circular minifigure head icons appears along the bottom edge of the screen. The red figure remains in a crouching stance.

The character selection grid remains visible at the bottom. The blue cursor shifts from the green skull icon to a blonde-haired minifigure icon. Text prompts for "Aceptar" and "Cancelar" appear in the top-left corner near the green portrait. The large red muscular figure and green hooded figure stay stationary on the platform.

The character selection cursor traverses the bottom grid, highlighting a blonde minifigure labeled "Aldrich Killian," a black silhouette labeled "Capitán América (clásico)," and finally a blue-helmeted figure labeled "Capitán América." The stud counter remains fixed at 1.364.260 while the red muscular figure and green hooded figure stand stationary on the platform behind the menu interface.

The character selection cursor shifts from a black silhouette icon labeled "Capitán América (clásico)" to a blue-helmeted minifigure icon labeled "Capitán América." The background scene remains static with the large red muscular figure and green hooded figure standing on the white platform. The stud counter stays fixed at 1.364.260.

The stud counter value at the top center drops from 1.364.260 to 1.214.260. The blue selection cursor remains fixed on the blue-helmeted minifigure icon labeled "Capitán América" within the character grid. Behind the menu, the large red muscular figure and green hooded figure stand motionless on the white circular platform.

The character selection grid disappears, revealing a minifigure in a blue suit with a white star and shield standing on the platform. The top-left UI updates to show this blue-helmeted character's portrait and the text "Capitán América (clásico)," while the mini-map returns to the bottom-left corner. The large red muscular figure stands behind the new character.

The blue-suited minifigure holding a shield turns to the right on the white platform while the large red muscular figure stands behind. A new minifigure with brown hair and a grey jacket walks into the frame from the right side, approaching the platform area. The mini-map remains visible in the bottom-left corner.

The blue-suited minifigure turns from facing right to facing left, holding a circular shield. The brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks further right toward a wooden bench. The large red muscular figure remains stationary on the white platform behind the blue figure. The mini-map and heart UI persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure moves to the left edge of the white platform, extending an arm forward while holding a shield. The brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks toward the wooden bench on the right. The large red muscular figure stands stationary on the platform behind the blue figure.

The blue-suited minifigure turns to face right, holding a circular shield with a star. Behind on the white platform, the large red muscular figure stands stationary. To the right, the brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks further toward the railing. UI elements like the mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure turns from facing right to facing forward, holding a circular shield with a star emblem. Behind on the white platform, the large red muscular figure remains stationary. To the right, the brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket continues walking toward the railing. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure stands on the white platform holding a circular shield. Behind, the large red muscular figure remains stationary. To the right, the brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks past the railing post. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the white platform to face the large red muscular figure, holding a circular shield. The red figure remains stationary in a crouched stance. To the right, the brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks further toward the railing edge. The mini-map and health hearts remain visible in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure throws the circular shield, which spins mid-air toward the right. The large red muscular figure remains stationary on the platform. To the right, the brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks near the railing edge.

The blue-suited minifigure holds a throwing pose on the platform as the spinning shield disappears off-screen right. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind. The brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks further right toward a tree trunk and lamp post. The mini-map and health UI persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure stands upright holding the circular shield again. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the white platform. The brown-haired minifigure walks further right near the railing and lamp post. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure rotates right, holding the circular shield. The large red muscular figure stays crouched on the white platform. The brown-haired minifigure walks further right near the tree and lamp post. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The character selection grid vanishes, returning to gameplay view. The blue-suited minifigure stands on the white platform facing forward-left with a shield. The mini-map reappears in the bottom-left corner, and text reading "Capitán América (clásico)" displays top-left. The large red figure remains crouched behind.

The text "Capitán América (clásico)" disappears from the top left UI. The blue-suited minifigure rotates to face right. A blonde minifigure in pink clothing stands near the bottom right railing. The large red figure remains crouched on the white platform. The mini-map stays visible in the bottom left corner.

The blue-suited minifigure rotates slightly right while holding a shield. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the white platform behind. A blonde minifigure in pink clothing stands near the bottom right railing. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the UI corners.

The camera pans right, revealing a green park with trees and a path while the circus tent shifts to the left edge. The blue-suited minifigure stands on the white platform facing right holding a shield. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind on the platform. The blonde minifigure in pink is no longer visible in the bottom right corner.

The camera continues panning right, shifting the circus tent to the extreme left edge and revealing a green park with trees and a path. The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the white platform to face away from the camera. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind. The mini-map stays visible in the bottom-left corner.

The camera pans left from the park, bringing the red-and-white striped circus tent back to the center. The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the white platform to face forward-left, holding a circular shield. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind on the platform. The mini-map is visible in the bottom-left corner.

The blue-suited minifigure rotates slightly to face forward while holding a circular shield. Behind on the white platform, the large red muscular figure remains crouched in a stationary pose. The red-and-white striped circus tent with the clown face stays centered in the background, and UI elements like the mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure rotates to face forward on the white platform, holding a circular shield. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind. The red-and-white striped circus tent with the clown face is centered in the background. UI elements like the mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

The blue-suited minifigure stands facing forward on the white platform holding a shield. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind. The red-and-white striped circus tent is visible in the background. UI elements like the mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

A character selection menu appears, covering the lower screen with rows of circular character icons, many showing question marks. The text "Capitán América (clásico)" floats above the grid. The stud count "1.214.260" is at the top. The blue and red figures remain on the white platform in the background, while the mini-map disappears.

The character selection menu remains open. The blue selection circle moves to a question mark icon in the grid. Red text reading "Bloqueado" appears above the cursor. The stud count remains 1.214.260. The blue and red figures stand stationary on the platform in the background.

The character selection menu remains open. The blue cursor shifts to a black silhouette icon in the lower grid rows, revealing the text "Union Jack - 150.000" above it. In the background, the blue-suited minifigure and large red figure stand stationary on the white platform.

The character selection menu remains static, highlighting a black silhouette icon labeled "Union Jack - 150.000". The blue cursor stays fixed on this icon. In the background, the blue-suited figure and large red figure remain stationary on the white platform. The stud counter at the top reads 1.214.260.

The character selection menu remains static, with the blue cursor fixed on a black silhouette icon labeled "Union Jack - 150.000". In the background, the blue-suited minifigure and large red figure remain stationary on the white platform. The stud counter at the top stays at 1.214.260, and no visual changes occur.

The character selection menu remains static, highlighting the black silhouette icon labeled "Union Jack - 150.000". In the background, the blue-suited minifigure and large red figure stay stationary on the white platform. The stud counter remains at 1.214.260 with no visual changes occurring.

The selection cursor highlights the Union Jack icon, purchasing the character for 150,000 studs, causing the total stud count to drop to 1,064,260. The active minifigure on the white platform transforms into the Union Jack character, wearing a blue suit with a flag emblem. The character selection menu overlay begins to fade out.

The character selection menu disappears completely. The active minifigure, now wearing a blue suit with a Union Jack flag on the chest, stands on the white platform. The stud counter reads 1,064,260. The mini-map reappears in the bottom-left corner as the character begins to run forward across the paved area.

The minifigure in the blue suit with a Union Jack flag runs left across the paved ground, holding a grey weapon in his raised right hand. The camera pans left to follow his movement, while the large red figure remains stationary on the white platform in the background near the circus tent.

The blue-suited minifigure with the Union Jack flag moves left and raises a grey weapon, aiming at a wooden bench near a black lamppost where a red target reticle appears. The camera pans left to reveal a grassy park area with trees and a path, while the large red figure remains standing on the white platform in the background.

The blue-suited minifigure with a British flag on the chest fires a grey weapon, destroying the wooden bench near the lamppost. The bench shatters into pieces, releasing silver studs as the stud counter increases. The camera pans left, revealing more grassy park area and trees while the large red figure remains stationary in the background.

The blue-suited minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs right towards the stairs leading to the circus tent. The camera pans right to follow him, leaving the large red figure on the left edge. The stud counter rises to 1,064,650. He approaches two other minifigures standing near the railing by the steps.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs up the stairs but is then seen lying prone on the ground near the railing. The large red muscular figure moves from the background platform into the immediate foreground on the left, facing right, while the stud counter remains at 1,064,650.

The blue-suited minifigure runs left along a paved path, joined by a blonde minifigure wearing a red shirt. On the far right, the large red muscular figure leaps over a railing. The camera pans left, following the characters away from the circus tent area.

The blue-suited minifigure runs left along a paved path bordered by a stone wall and grass. The camera follows, displaying the text "Central Park" at the bottom center. The character moves away from the circus area, leaving the large red figure and blonde character behind as the path curves left through the park.

The blue minifigure with a Union Jack flag runs up concrete stairs flanked by metal railings. Upon reaching the top, the character continues running onto a grassy path surrounded by trees and flowers. The text "Central Park" remains at the bottom center as the camera follows the figure moving further into the park area.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs up concrete stairs flanked by metal railings. Upon reaching the top, the character continues running onto a grassy path surrounded by trees and flowers. The text "Central Park" remains at the bottom center as the camera follows the figure moving further into the park area.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs up concrete stairs onto a grassy path. The "Central Park" text disappears as the character advances toward silver studs and green bushes. The camera follows, revealing city buildings and trees in the background, while the stud counter "1.064.650" appears at the top center.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs forward on a dirt path, collecting silver and gold studs, causing the counter to rise to 1.065.090. A large red muscular figure enters from the right edge, running left, while a brown-haired minifigure runs ahead on the path.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag runs forward along the dirt path, aiming a black weapon at green LEGO bushes on the left. The stud counter remains static at 1.065.090. The large red figure stays on the right edge, while the brown-haired figure runs further ahead in the distance near city buildings.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag shoots the green bushes on the left, causing them to shatter into silver studs and debris. The stud counter rises to 1.065.130. The large red figure stays on the right path edge, and the brown-haired figure runs further ahead towards the city buildings in the background.

The blue minifigure destroys the green LEGO bushes on the left, causing silver studs to scatter and the counter to rise to 1.065.220. The character moves rapidly forward along the dirt path, appearing blurred near the ground. The large red figure remains visible on the right edge, standing near the path as the blue figure passes a large tree trunk.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag continues running forward along the grassy path. The large red muscular figure transitions from running on the right to a crouched stance on the left side of the path. The stud counter at the top increases to 1.065.250.

The blue minifigure wearing a Union Jack suit stops running and stands facing forward on the grassy path. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the left side of the path. The background shows city buildings and trees under bright daylight. The mini-map and health hearts remain visible in the corners.

The blue minifigure with a Union Jack flag stands stationary on the grass, facing forward. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the left. The background features green trees and city buildings. The interface displays health hearts and a mini-map, but the stud counter at the top center is no longer visible.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag begins to run forward across the grass. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the left side of the path. The background shows city buildings and trees. The mini-map and health hearts are visible.

The blue minifigure with the Union Jack flag continues running forward along the grassy path. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the left side. The camera follows the blue figure, revealing more of the park's green grass and trees. The mini-map and health hearts remain visible in the corners.

summary.text:
[0-2] Two LEGO minifigures, one in a light blue uniform and another a translucent green ghost, stand on a white circular platform before a red-and-white striped circus tent featuring a clown face, glowing red eyes, and orange fire effects. UI displays a mini-map, hearts, and "GAMMEPLAY".
[2-6] A minifigure with black hair and a white shirt enters left. A bright yellow explosion surrounds the blue-uniformed figure. A gold stud counter appears, rising from "1.362.890" to "1.363.300" amidst floating silver studs.
[6-8] The counter increases to "1.363.730". The explosion vanishes, revealing the blue-uniformed figure standing normally. A brown-haired figure in a dark jacket enters bottom left.
[8-12] The blue-uniformed figure runs off the platform, jumps up the hill, then runs to a wooden bench near a black lamppost. The bench tilts, spawning silver studs. The counter reaches "1.364.010". The black-haired figure stands foreground left while the green ghost is partially visible.

[12-14] The blue-uniformed minifigure jumps mid-air near the stairs then lands on the white platform. The black-haired minifigure moves to the right foreground, while the green ghost shifts to the platform's right side. A brown-haired figure walks left in the background. The stud counter rises to 1.364.250. [14-16] The blue-uniformed minifigure and green ghost remain stationary on the white platform. The brown-haired minifigure in the dark jacket ascends the stairs toward the circus tent entrance. The black-haired minifigure in the white shirt walks further right. The stud counter disappears. [16-18] The blue-uniformed minifigure extends both arms outward. Background figures walk further up the stone stairs. [18-20] The blue-uniformed minifigure transforms, revealing a red face and red hands while striking a dynamic pose. [20-22] The blue-uniformed minifigure completes its transformation into a large, muscular red figure with black pants. The translucent green ghost figure remains stationary to the right. Background figures continue walking up the stone stairs. "GAMMEPLAY", "<< ANTERIOR", and "SIGUIENTE >>" appear on screen.

[22-24] The camera rotates right, revealing a wooden bench and black lamppost while a large red muscular figure and a green hooded figure stand on a white platform. [24-26] The top-left UI displays a green skull portrait labeled "Doctor Muerte" as a character selection grid appears at the bottom. [26-30] The cursor navigates the grid, highlighting "Aldrich Killian," a black silhouette labeled "Capitán América (clásico)," and finally a blue-helmeted figure labeled "Capitán América," with "Aceptar" and "Cancelar" prompts visible. [32-34] The stud counter drops from 1.364.260 to 1.214.260 while the selection remains on "Capitán América" against the backdrop of the circus tent and "GAMMEPLAY" text.

[34-36] The character selection grid disappears, revealing a blue-suited minifigure with a shield on the platform; the UI updates to "Capitán América (clásico)" and the mini-map returns. [36-38] The blue figure turns right while a brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket enters from the right. [38-40] The blue figure turns left holding a shield as the brown-haired figure walks toward a bench. [40-42] The blue figure moves to the platform's left edge, extending an arm, while the brown-haired figure approaches the bench. [42-44] The blue figure faces right with a shield as the brown-haired figure walks further right toward the railing, with the large red muscular figure remaining stationary behind throughout.

[46-48] A character selection screen highlights "Capitán América (clásico)" with a score of 1.214.260. In gameplay, a blue-suited minifigure stands on a white platform holding a circular shield. Behind, a large red muscular figure remains stationary. To the right, a brown-haired minifigure in a grey jacket walks past a railing post. The mini-map and health hearts persist.
[48-50] The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the platform to face the large red figure, who stays crouched. The brown-haired minifigure walks further toward the railing edge.
[50-52] The blue-suited minifigure throws the circular shield, spinning mid-air right. The large red figure remains stationary. The brown-haired minifigure walks near the railing edge.
[52-54] The blue-suited minifigure holds a throwing pose as the shield disappears off-screen right. The large red figure remains crouched. The brown-haired minifigure walks right toward a tree trunk and lamp post. The mini-map and health UI persist.

[58-60] The character selection grid vanishes, returning to gameplay. A blue-suited minifigure stands on a white platform facing forward-left with a shield, while a large red figure remains crouched behind. The mini-map reappears bottom-left, and OCR "Capitán América (clásico)" displays top-left.
[60-64] The text "Capitán América (clásico)" disappears. The blue-suited minifigure rotates to face right, holding a shield. A blonde minifigure in pink clothing stands near the bottom right railing. The large red muscular figure remains crouched on the white platform behind. UI elements persist.
[64-66] The camera pans right, revealing a green park with trees and a path as the circus tent shifts left. The blue-suited minifigure stands on the platform facing right with a shield. The large red figure remains crouched behind. The blonde minifigure is no longer visible.

[66-68] The camera pans right, shifting the red-and-white striped circus tent to the left edge and revealing a green park with trees and a path. The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the white platform to face away from the camera. The large red muscular figure remains crouched behind. UI elements include the mini-map (bottom-left), health hearts (top-left), and text "GAMMEPLAY", "<< ANTERIOR", "SIGUIENTE >>".
[68-74] The camera pans left, recentering the circus tent with the clown face. The blue-suited minifigure rotates on the white platform to face forward-left, then forward, holding a circular shield. The large red muscular figure stays crouched on the platform in a stationary pose. The mini-map and health hearts persist in the corners.

[56-58] A blue-suited minifigure rotates right holding a circular shield while a large red muscular figure crouches on a white platform. A brown-haired minifigure walks right near a lamp post. [74-76] The blue figure faces forward on the platform; the red figure remains crouched behind against a red-and-white striped circus tent backdrop. UI elements persist. [76-78] A character selection menu overlays the screen with rows of circular icons, many marked with question marks. "Capitán América (clásico)" text appears above the grid, and the stud count reads "1.214.260". The mini-map vanishes. [78-80] The selection cursor highlights a question mark icon, triggering red "Bloqueado" text. The background figures remain stationary.

[82-88] The character selection menu remains static, highlighting a black silhouette icon labeled "Union Jack - 150.000". The stud counter at the top reads "1.214.260". In the background, a blue-suited minifigure holding a shield and a large red figure stand stationary on a white platform in front of red-and-white striped tents. The grid displays numerous locked character icons. UI text includes "GAMMEPLAY", "Aceptar", "Cancelar", "<< ANTERIOR", and "SIGUIENTE >>".
[88-90] The selection is confirmed, purchasing the character for 150,000 studs. The total stud count drops to "1.064.260". The active minifigure transforms into Union Jack, wearing a blue suit with a Union Jack flag on the torso. The character name "Union Jack" appears above the figure. The selection menu overlay fades out, leaving the character standing on the platform.

[90-92] The character selection menu disappears, revealing a minifigure in a blue suit with a Union Jack flag on the white platform as the stud counter reads 1.064.260 and the mini-map reappears in the bottom-left corner. [92-96] The minifigure runs left across the paved ground, holding a grey weapon and aiming at a wooden bench near a black lamppost where a red target reticle appears, while a large red figure stands stationary on the platform near the circus tent. [96-98] The character fires the weapon, destroying the bench which shatters into pieces releasing silver studs, increasing the stud counter through 1.064.290 and 1.064.400 to 1.064.540 as the camera pans left revealing the park area and the text "Circo" on the ground.

[98-100] A blue-suited minifigure with a Union Jack flag runs right toward stairs labeled "Circo," approaching two minifigures near a railing as the stud counter displays 1,064,650. [100-102] The blue figure lies prone on the ground near the railing while a large red muscular figure moves into the immediate foreground left, facing right. [102-104] The blue figure runs left along a paved path, joined by a blonde minifigure in a red shirt, while the red figure leaps over a railing on the right. [104-106] The blue figure continues left along a path bordered by a stone wall as "Central Park" text appears at the bottom, moving away from the circus area and leaving the red figure and blonde character behind as the path curves.

[80-82] The character selection menu remains open as the blue cursor shifts to a black silhouette icon, revealing the text "Union Jack - 150.000" above it, while a blue-suited minifigure and large red figure stand stationary on a white platform in the background. [106-112] The blue minifigure with a Union Jack flag runs up concrete stairs flanked by metal railings. Upon reaching the top, the character continues running onto a grassy path surrounded by trees and flowers. The text "Central Park" remains at the bottom center initially but disappears as the character advances toward silver studs and green bushes. The camera follows, revealing city buildings and trees in the background, while the stud counter "1.064.650" appears at the top center and increases. A large red figure and a character in a grey suit are seen running on the path nearby.

[114-118] A blue minifigure with a Union Jack flag runs forward along a dirt path, aiming a black weapon at green LEGO bushes on the left. The stud counter reads "1.065.090". A large red figure stands on the right edge, while a brown-haired figure runs ahead near city buildings. The blue minifigure shoots the green bushes, shattering them into silver studs and debris. The stud counter increases to "1.065.130". Text "GAMMEPLAY", "<< ANTERIOR", and "SIGUIENTE >>" is visible.

[118-122] The blue minifigure destroys the remaining green LEGO bushes, scattering silver studs as the counter rises to "1.065.220". The character moves rapidly forward, appearing blurred near the ground, passing a large tree trunk. The large red figure stands near the path on the right. The blue minifigure continues running forward along the grassy path. The large red muscular figure transitions from running on the right to a crouched stance on the left side of the path. The stud counter increases to "1.065.250".
